ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the recorded data */,
  "week" INTEGER /* The week of the recorded data */,
  "SMN" REAL /* Standardized Moisture Index based on precipitation */,
  "SMT" REAL /* Standardized Moisture Index based on temperature */,
  "VCI" REAL /* Vegetation Condition Index */,
  "TCI" REAL /* Temperature Condition Index */,
  "VHI" REAL /* Vegetation Health Index */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the weather station */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the satellite dataset */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "week"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellite_data ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset captured by the satellite */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was captured */,
  "data_link" TEXT /* Link to the satellite data */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "satellite_orbit" TEXT /* Orbit of the satellite */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was captured */,
  "data_resolution" TEXT /* Spatial resolution of the data */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "data_week" INTEGER /* Week of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source accessed (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the prediction is made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the prediction period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the prediction period */,
  "predicted_VHI" REAL /* Predicted Vegetation Health Index */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the prediction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the prediction */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
